PRISM_MOD_CARD_REINFORCE.title: Reinforce
PRISM_MOD_CARD_GUARD.title: Guard
PRISM_MOD_CARD_PRISM_WHIRLWIND.title: Prism Whirlwind
PRISM_MOD_CARD_ANCIENT_PRISM_WHIRLWIND.d: [gold]Attack Intent[/gold] deal {Damage:diff()} damage to all enemies. Immediately deal {Damage:diff()}x{Repeat} damage to all enemies.
PRISM_MOD_CARD_RADIANT_GAMBLE.title: Radiant Gamble
PRISM_MOD_CARD_BURIED.title: Buried
PRISM_MOD_CARD_BURIED.description: Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold]. Shuffle {Rocks:diff()} Giant Rocks into your draw pile.
PRISM_MOD_CARD_PRISM_BEAM.title: Prism Beam
PRISM_MOD_CARD_PRISM_BEAM.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to all enemies. Doubled for each other Prism Beam.
PRISM_MOD_CARD_FIELD_PROCUREMENT.title: Field Procurement
PRISM_MOD_CARD_FIELD_PROCUREMENT.descrip: Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold]. For the next {Turns:diff()} turns, add a playable [gold]other-character[/gold] card to your [gold]hand[/gold].
PRISM_MOD_CARD_SHARD_RUSH.title: Shard Rush
PRISM_MOD_CARD_SHARD_RUSH.description: Deal {Damage:diff()}x{Repeat} damage. Add {Cards:diff()} [gold]other-character[/gold] card to your [gold]hand[/gold].
PRISM_MOD_CARD_PRISMATIC_COVER.title: Prismatic Cover
PRISM_MOD_CARD_PRISMATIC_COVER.descripti: Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold]. [gold]Other-character[/gold] cards in your [gold]hand[/gold] cost 1 less this turn.
PRISM_MOD_CARD_BORROWED_FANGS.title: Borrowed Fangs
PRISM_MOD_CARD_BORROWED_FANGS.descriptio: [gold]Attack Intent[/gold] deal {IntentDamage:diff()}x{Repeat} damage to all enemies. Immediately add {Cards:diff()} [gold]other-character[/gold] card to your [gold]hand[/gold].
PRISM_MOD_CARD_COMMON_RUMMAGE.title: Common Rummage
PRISM_MOD_CARD_COMMON_RUMMAGE.descriptio: Draw {Cards:diff()} cards. If you have an [gold]other-character[/gold] card in your [gold]hand[/gold], draw {BonusCards:diff()} more card. Discard {Discard:diff()} card.
PRISM_MOD_CARD_PEAK_OF_FOLLY.title: Peak of Folly
PRISM_MOD_CARD_PEAK_OF_FOLLY.description: Add {Cards:diff()} Common [gold]other-character[/gold] cards to your [gold]hand[/gold]. Add {Rocks:diff()} Giant Rocks to your discard pile.
PRISM_MOD_CARD_GHOST_N_GOBLINS.title: Ghosts 'n Goblins
PRISM_MOD_CARD_GHOST_N_GOBLINS.descripti: Whenever you play a card from [gold]another character[/gold], alternate effects. Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to a random enemy. Summon {Summon:diff()}.
PRISM_MOD_CARD_GENT_AND_FECT.title: Gent and Fect
PRISM_MOD_CARD_GENT_AND_FECT.description: Every turn, gain {Stars:diff()} Stars and Channel a random Orb.
PRISM_MOD_CARD_MIXED_SIGNALS.title: Mixed Signals
PRISM_MOD_CARD_MIXED_SIGNALS.description: Add {Cards:diff()} [gold]other-character[/gold] Attacks or Skills to your [gold]hand[/gold]. For each Attack, gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold]. For each Skill, deal {Damage:diff()} damage to a random enemy.
PRISM_MOD_CARD_BORROWED_MOMENT.title: Borrowed Moment
PRISM_MOD_CARD_BORROWED_MOMENT.descripti: Draw {Draw:diff()} card. Choose up to {Cards:diff()} card in your [gold]hand[/gold]. Retain them this turn.
PRISM_MOD_CARD_SPARK_OF_INTENT.title: Spark of Intent
PRISM_MOD_CARD_SPARK_OF_INTENT.descripti: [gold]Attack Intent[/gold] deal {IntentDamage:diff()} damage. Immediately deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
PRISM_MOD_CARD_EXHAUST_FLARE.title: Exhaust Flare
PRISM_MOD_CARD_EXHAUST_FLARE.description: Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage to all enemies. Increased by the number of cards in your [gold]Exhaust pile[/gold].
PRISM_MOD_CARD_RECYCLED_GUARD.title: Recycled Guard
PRISM_MOD_CARD_RECYCLED_GUARD.descriptio: Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold]. Return {Cards:diff()} random card from your [gold]Exhaust pile[/gold] to your [gold]hand[/gold].
PRISM_MOD_CARD_ARCHMAGES_RUNE.title: Archmage's Rune
PRISM_MOD_CARD_ARCHMAGES_RUNE.descriptio: Play random cards until their total cost reaches {CostTotal:diff()}.
PRISM_MOD_CARD_DOPAMINE.title: Dopamine
PRISM_MOD_CARD_DOPAMINE.description: Whenever you play a card, add a random card to your [gold]hand[/gold] with its cost set to {FreeCost:energyIcons()} and lose {DopaminePower:diff()} HP.
PRISM_MOD_CARD_HIDDEN_CARD.title: Hidden Card
PRISM_MOD_CARD_HIDDEN_CARD.description: Play random Exhaust cards that cost 2 or more until their total cost reaches {CostTotal:diff()}.
PRISM_MOD_CARD_SCAR.title: Scar
PRISM_MOD_CARD_SCAR.description: Lose {HpLoss:diff()} HP. Fill your [gold]hand[/gold] with Shivs.
PRISM_MOD_CARD_RADIATE.title: Prism Discharge
PRISM_MOD_CARD_RADIATE.description: Play X+{BonusCards:diff()} random card(s) from your [gold]Exhaust pile[/gold].
PRISM_MOD_CARD_VITAL_SPARK.title: Vital Spark
PRISM_MOD_CARD_VITAL_SPARK.description: Whenever you are attacked, gain {Energy:energyIcons()} next turn.
PRISM_MOD_CARD_PULSATE.title: Heartbeat
PRISM_MOD_CARD_RESCUE_STRIKE.title: Rescue Strike
PRISM_MOD_CARD_FACETED_GUARD.title: Faceted Guard
PRISM_MOD_CARD_SHARP_AFTERIMAGE.title: Sharp Afterimage
PRISM_MOD_CARD_SHARP_AFTERIMAGE.descript: [gold]Attack Intent[/gold] deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Immediately draw {Cards:diff()} card.
PRISM_MOD_CARD_SECRET_PROCUREMENT.title: Secret Procurement
PRISM_MOD_CARD_SECRET_PROCUREMENT.descri: Choose 1 of 3 [gold]other-character[/gold] cards to add to your [gold]hand[/gold]. Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
PRISM_MOD_CARD_SHARD_FINDER.title: Shard Finder
PRISM_MOD_CARD_PRISM_REFRACTION.title: Prism Refraction
PRISM_MOD_CARD_FORCED_FLARE.title: Forced Flare
PRISM_MOD_CARD_FORCED_FLARE.description: [gold]Attack Intent[/gold] deal {IntentDamage:diff()} damage to all enemies. Immediately deal {Damage:diff()} damage to all enemies.
PRISM_MOD_CARD_SHARD_SALVAGE.title: Shard Salvage
PRISM_MOD_CARD_SHARD_SALVAGE.description: Add {Cards:diff()} random card from your [gold]Exhaust pile[/gold] to your [gold]hand[/gold].
PRISM_MOD_CARD_SCATTERED_STRIKE.title: Scattered Strike
PRISM_MOD_CARD_SCATTERED_STRIKE.descript: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to all enemies. Draw {Cards:diff()} card.
PRISM_MOD_CARD_ANGULAR_COVER.title: Angular Cover
PRISM_MOD_CARD_MIRROR_SCREEN.title: Mirror Screen
PRISM_MOD_CARD_MIRROR_SCREEN.description: Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold]. Reflect the next unblocked attack damage you take before your next turn.
PRISM_MOD_CARD_BIG_SHARD.title: Big Shard
PRISM_MOD_CARD_PRISMATIC_BRAND.title: Prismatic Brand
PRISM_MOD_CARD_CHROMATIC_ABERRATION.desc: Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold]. If you have an [gold]other-character[/gold] card in your [gold]hand[/gold], draw {Cards:diff()} card.
PRISM_MOD_CARD_AFTERGLOW_COMPRESSION.des: Draw {Cards:diff()} cards. This turn, cards in your [gold]hand[/gold] that cost 2 or more cost 1.
PRISM_MOD_CARD_REFRACTIVE_DISTORTION.des: Apply {Power:diff()} Vulnerable. If you generated a card this turn, reduce Strength by {StrengthPower:diff()} this turn.
PRISM_MOD_CARD_OVERCHARGED_LENS.title: Overcharged Lens
PRISM_MOD_CARD_OVERCHARGED_LENS.descript: Draw {Draw:diff()} card. The first time you play a card that costs 2 or more this turn, draw {Cards:diff()} cards.
PRISM_MOD_CARD_KALEIDOSCOPE_HEART.title: Kaleidoscope Heart
PRISM_MOD_CARD_KALEIDOSCOPE_HEART.descri: The first {KaleidoscopeHeartPower:diff()} times you generate a card each turn, gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold] and draw {Cards:diff()} card.
PRISM_MOD_CARD_LIGHT_SHARD_SHIELD.title: Light Shard Shield
PRISM_MOD_CARD_LITERALLY_FEMALE.title: Literally Female-
PRISM_MOD_CARD_LITERALLY_FEMALE.descript:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to a random enemy. Trigger {Repeat:diff()} times.
[gold]Attack Intent[/gold] trigger {Repeat:diff()} times.
PRISM_MOD_CARD_BORROWED_ORBIT.title: Borrowed Orbit
PRISM_MOD_CARD_BORROWED_ORBIT.descriptio: Whenever you play a card from [gold]another character[/gold], draw {Cards:diff()} additional card next turn.
PRISM_MOD_CARD_DEBRIS_REACTION.title: Debris Reaction
PRISM_MOD_CARD_DEBRIS_REACTION.descripti: Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold]. If a card was Exhausted this turn, gain {BonusBlock:diff()} more [gold]Block[/gold].
PRISM_MOD_CARD_DELAYED_AMPLIFICATION.des: Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold]. Delay your [gold]Attack Intent[/gold] by 1 turn and double it.
PRISM_MOD_CARD_HEAVY_REFRACTION.title: Heavy Refraction
PRISM_MOD_CARD_HEAVY_REFRACTION.descript: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to all enemies. Gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
PRISM_MOD_CARD_INVERSE_FUND.title: Inverse Fund
PRISM_MOD_CARD_INVERSE_FUND.description: Cards that cost more than 2 cost 2. Put {Cards:diff()} card that costs 2 or more from your draw pile into your [gold]hand[/gold].
PRISM_MOD_CARD_PRISM_REARRANGEMENT.title: Prism Rearrangement
PRISM_MOD_CARD_PRISM_REARRANGEMENT.descr: Transform an [gold]other-character[/gold] card in your [gold]hand[/gold] into {Cards:diff()} [gold]other-character[/gold] cards. Exhaust.
PRISM_MOD_CARD_PRISMATIC_SPREAD.title: Prismatic Spread
PRISM_MOD_CARD_PRISMATIC_SPREAD.descript: Shuffle [gold]other-character[/gold] cards into your [gold]hand[/gold], draw pile, and discard pile. Draw {Cards:diff()} cards.
PRISM_MOD_CARD_RIFT_STORAGE.title: Rift Storage
PRISM_MOD_CARD_RIFT_STORAGE.description: Add {Cards:diff()} random Skill from your [gold]Exhaust pile[/gold] to your [gold]hand[/gold].
PRISM_MOD_CARD_EXTERNAL_REFRACTION.title: External Refraction
PRISM_MOD_CARD_EXTERNAL_REFRACTION.descr: Whenever you play a card from [gold]another character[/gold], gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold] and draw {Cards:diff()} card.
PRISM_MOD_CARD_SHARD_FURNACE.title: Shard Furnace
PRISM_MOD_CARD_SHARD_FURNACE.description: At the end of each turn, Exhaust your [gold]hand[/gold]. For each card, deal {Damage:diff()}x{Repeat} damage to all enemies.
PRISM_MOD_CARD_LENS_RUNAWAY.title: Lens Runaway
PRISM_MOD_CARD_LENS_RUNAWAY.description: Whenever you play a card that costs 2 or more, increase the damage of your [gold]Attack Intent[/gold] by {Damage:diff()}.
PRISM_MOD_CARD_INTENT_BREAKER.title: Stop Loss
PRISM_MOD_CARD_INTENT_BREAKER.descriptio: Deal {Damage:diff()}x{Repeat} damage. Trigger your [gold]Attack Intent[/gold] against this enemy, then reduce it by {Percent:diff()}%.
PRISM_MOD_CARD_PRISM_GUILLOTINE.title: Limit Up
PRISM_MOD_CARD_PRISM_GUILLOTINE.descript: Deal {Damage:diff()}x{Repeat} damage. Deals {BonusDamage:diff()} more per hit for each [gold]other-character[/gold] card you played this combat.
PRISM_MOD_CARD_FRACTURE_STORM.title: Market Crash
PRISM_MOD_CARD_FRACTURE_STORM.descriptio: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to all enemies. If your [gold]Exhaust pile[/gold] has {Threshold:diff()} or more cards, repeat this.
PRISM_MOD_CARD_SPECTRUM_LANCE.title: Leverage
PRISM_MOD_CARD_SPECTRUM_LANCE.descriptio: Deal {Damage:diff()}x{Repeat} damage. Put a card that costs 2 or more from your draw pile into your [gold]hand[/gold].
PRISM_MOD_CARD_PERFECT_REFRACTION.title: Buyback
PRISM_MOD_CARD_PERFECT_REFRACTION.descri: Add {Cards:diff()} random card from your [gold]Exhaust pile[/gold] to your [gold]hand[/gold]. Exhaust.
PRISM_MOD_CARD_FOLD.title: Fold
PRISM_MOD_CARD_FOLD.description: Play up to {Cards:diff()} playable cards in your [gold]hand[/gold]. End your turn.
PRISM_MOD_CARD_LIGHT_BET.title: Light Bet
PRISM_MOD_CARD_BORROWED_FOOTWORK.title: Diversify
PRISM_MOD_CARD_BORROWED_FOOTWORK.descrip: The first time you play an [gold]other-character[/gold] card each turn, gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
PRISM_MOD_CARD_WARNING_COLOR.title: Bearish Signal
PRISM_MOD_CARD_WARNING_COLOR.description: The first time you create [gold]Attack Intent[/gold] each turn, apply {WeakPower:diff()} Weak to its target.
PRISM_MOD_CARD_GRAVITY_CAPACITOR.title: Safe Asset
PRISM_MOD_CARD_GRAVITY_CAPACITOR.descrip: Whenever you play a card that costs 2 or more, gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
PRISM_MOD_CARD_BORROWED_EDGE.title: Day Trade
PRISM_MOD_CARD_BORROWED_EDGE.description: Deal {Damage:diff()}x{Repeat} damage. If you played an [gold]other-character[/gold] card this turn, draw {Cards:diff()} card.
